# Mix of legit and slopsquatted/typosquatted names for audit testing.
requests==2.31.0
pyjwt==2.8.0
# --- the following should be FLAGGED ---
requessts==1.0.0          # typo of "requests"
python-jwt==9.9.9         # near-miss / wrong package for "pyjwt"
beautifulsoup==1.0.0      # should be beautifulsoup4
totally-made-up-helper    # hallucinated package, does not exist on PyPI
